title: 363帆的原版美化
description: The original beautification series offers excellent visual enhancements without compromising core gameplay features, while also delivering impressive frame rates.
body:
### 💡主要特点
搭配优秀的美化模组，为玩家提供舒适的视觉和不错的帧率
你可以使用它随意的进入原版服务器
### ❓发现问题和提交建议
请你把相应的问题和log文件发送到：fan221153@gmail.com或加入我们的[QQ群](https://qm.qq.com/q/TCqut01AcM)进行反馈
### ❓关于多版本
因作者技术有限，版本之间可能存在差异，推荐版本1.21.11,1.21.1和最新版本，使用了[viafabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus)你可以放心的去进行跨版本游玩
### ❓版本更新规律
在Minecraft推出新正式版后的一周内会尝试更新一次整合包；0.x.0为内容性更新，0.0.x为修复性更新
### ‼️关于可选模组
[IMBlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/imblocker-original)：为中文输入提供支持；
[Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music)：修改游戏音乐（此mod文件较大）；
[Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)：为手部添加额外的动画
### ‼️注意事项
请使用Java22+来启动游戏
### ⭐关于版权问题
没有任何版权限制，你可以随意分发复制
### 💡Main Features
Combined with excellent aesthetic mods, it provides players with a comfortable visual experience and a decent frame rate.
You can use it to freely access the vanilla server.
### ❓Identify problems and submit suggestions
Please send the relevant issues and log files to fan221153@gmail.com or join our QQ group (https://qm.qq.com/q/TCqut01AcM) to provide feedback.
### ❓About Multiple Versions
Due to the author's technical limitations, there may be differences between versions. Versions 1.21.11, 1.21.1, and the latest version are recommended. Using [viafabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus) allows you to confidently play across different versions.
### ❓Version Update Pattern
Within a month of the release of a new official version of Minecraft, an update pack will be attempted; 0.x.0 is a content update, and 0.0.x is a bug fix update.
### ‼️Regarding optional modules
[IMBlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/imblocker-original): Provides support for Chinese input;
[Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music): Modifies the game's music (this mod file is large);
[Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items): Adds extra animation to the hands
### ‼️Important Notes
Please use Java 22+ to launch the game.
### ⭐Regarding copyright issues
There are no copyright restrictions; you are free to distribute and copy them.
